name: kbatyuk/captcha
description: A PHP library for generating and validating CAPTCHA tokens to protect applications from automated abuse

check-fonts:
php -r "$fonts = ['/usr/share/fonts/truetype/dejavu/DejaVuSans-Bold.ttf', '/usr/share/fonts/truetype/liberation/LiberationSans-Bold.ttf']; $missing = array_filter($fonts, function($f) { return !file_exists($f); }); if (!empty($missing)) { echo '
⚠️  WARNING: Required CAPTCHA fonts are missing:
'; foreach ($missing as $font) echo '  - ' . $font . '
'; echo '
On Ubuntu/Debian: sudo apt-get install fonts-dejavu fonts-liberation
'; echo 'On CentOS/RHEL: sudo yum install dejavu-fonts liberation-fonts
'; echo 'On macOS: brew install font-dejavu font-liberation
'; exit(1); } else { echo '✓ All required CAPTCHA fonts found.
'; }"
